title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just Charge Case
scenario: User can trigger a firmware update for just the Charge Case in a 1-step DFU scenario, leaving the Earbuds on the lower version.
steps: Start the app with Osprey EB and CC (both on at least version 5039) where an update is available for both.
Click the update button for the Charge Case / Voyager Free 60 Charger Case.
expected: Only the CC DFU completes successfully; the EB stays on the lower version.
